command:
echo "=== REMY (OPENCLAW) INFO ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMY'
echo "--- OpenClaw service ---"
cat /etc/systemd/system/openclaw-gateway.service 2>/dev/null || systemctl cat openclaw-gateway 2>/dev/null
echo "--- OpenClaw version ---"
ls /home/jose/.openclaw/ 2>/dev/null || ls /opt/openclaw/ 2>/dev/null || which openclaw 2>/dev/null
echo "--- SOUL.md ---"
cat /home/jose/.openclaw/SOUL.md 2>/dev/null || cat /home/jose/SOUL.md 2>/dev/null || echo "not found"
echo "--- Config ---"
cat /home/jose/.openclaw/config.yaml 2>/dev/null | head -40
echo "--- Telegram env ---"
env | grep -i telegram 2>/dev/null
REMY

echo "=== CLOUDFLARE TUNNEL ROUTES ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.191 \
  "cat /etc/cloudflared/config.yml 2>/dev/null || cloudflared tunnel info 2>/dev/null | head -20"

echo "=== SAKURA BOT INFO ==="
curl -s "https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/getMe"
echo ""
curl -s "https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/getWebhookInfo"
